[`init?(named: String, fromURL: URL)`](/documentation/spritekit/skaction/init(named:fromurl:))Creates an action of the given name from an action file.[`init?(named: String, fromURL: URL, duration: TimeInterval)`](/documentation/spritekit/skaction/init(named:fromurl:duration:))Creates an action of the given name from an action file with a new duration.
